title: Looking for Financial Analyst at Ujjivan Small Finance Bank Holdings Services
company: Ujjivan Small Finance Bank Holdings Services

jsonLd.title: Looking for Financial Analyst at Ujjivan Small Finance Bank Holdings Services
jsonLd.description:
Ujjivan Small Finance Bank Holdings Services invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Financial Analyst at our Bengaluru location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Ujjivan Small Finance Bank Holdings Services:
Ujjivan Small Finance Bank Holdings Services is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Develop financial models and projections for business planning
• Manage credit risk assessment and loan appraisal processes
• Prepare MIS reports for senior management review
• Manage accounts payable and accounts receivable functions
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Coordinate with external auditors during annual audits
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Budgeting
• Proficiency in Ind AS
• Proficiency in SAP FICO
• Proficiency in Financial Reporting
• Proficiency in Python for Finance
• Proficiency in Income Tax
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Learning & development budget
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Bengaluru, Karnataka, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Ujjivan Small Finance Bank Holdings Services!
